keywords: end-to-end, full flow, cross-layer, multi-step, implement feature, across frontend backend database
examples: Implement this feature end-to-end; fix the whole flow; coordinate specialists
notes: Use orchestrator when the task spans multiple domains or requests the full delivery workflow

keywords: ui, component, page, layout, form, accessibility, a11y, styling, render, client state
examples: Fix button spacing; build a settings page; improve keyboard navigation
notes: Primary route for user-facing interface work

keywords: api, route, auth, server, endpoint, service, handler, permission, ownership
examples: Add upload route; fix 401 handling; update server-side validation
notes: Primary route for server behavior and integrations

keywords: type error, generic, zod, inference, contract, dto, schema typing, shared type
examples: Fix Zod mismatch; align DTO types; resolve TypeScript inference issue
notes: Use when compile-time and runtime contracts drift

keywords: schema, migration, rls, policy, sql, index, query plan, table, data integrity
examples: Add migration; fix RLS policy; optimize query and indexes
notes: Use for database structure and policy ownership

keywords: deploy, pipeline, ci, cd, rollback, monitoring, infrastructure, release, incident
examples: Prepare deployment pipeline; add rollback plan; improve monitoring
notes: Use for release automation and infrastructure safety

keywords: docs, readme, runbook, guide, changelog, tutorial, api docs
examples: Update README; write runbook; document API behavior
notes: Use when the main deliverable is documentation

keywords: test, verify, pass/fail, regression, edge case, coverage, smoke test
examples: Verify the fix; build a regression checklist; test acceptance criteria
notes: Use after implementation or for explicit verification requests

keywords: review, risk, maintainability, correctness, security review, findings
examples: Review this diff; look for risks; audit for maintainability
notes: Use for independent code review and risk analysis

keywords: plan, roadmap, phase, sequence, milestone, rollout, decomposition, dependencies
examples: Create a phased plan; break this down; define rollout steps
notes: Use when the user wants a plan instead of implementation

keywords: scope, acceptance criteria, priority, requirements, non-goal, mvp, user story
examples: Clarify requirements; define acceptance criteria; lock scope
notes: Use when the work needs tighter product framing

keywords: compare, evaluate, research, best practice, tradeoff, benchmark, investigate options
examples: Compare tools; research best practices; evaluate alternatives
notes: Use for open-ended analysis and recommendation work

keywords: bug, reproduce, flaky, regression, root cause, logs, trace, investigate
examples: Find root cause; debug flaky behavior; investigate production issue
notes: Use when the root cause is unclear or the issue spans layers

keywords: gws, google workspace, google cli, discovery, commands, validate, cli auth
examples: Add Google Workspace command; fix discovery bug; validate CLI auth flow
notes: Use for Google Workspace CLI-specific behavior
